name: Salmon Mousse (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Lightly oil a 1 lb. loaf tin or salmon mold.
3. Place the salmon in an ovenproof dish with fresh herbs and cover with water. Cover the dish with foil and cook for 30 minutes.
4. Remove the salmon from the liquid and cool it, then remove the skin and bones but reserve the liquid.
5. Pound the salmon until smooth.
6. Lightly whip the cream and fold into the salmon.
7. Soften the butter and stir in with the sherry and lemon juice to taste.
8. Measure 6 tablespoons of the reserved fish liquid into a bowl and sprinkle gelatin on top. Set over a pan of hot water until the gelatin has dissolved.
9. Cool slightly and then beat into the mousse.
10. Spoon the mousse into the tin or mold and leave to set in a cool place overnight.
11. Turn out to serve.
